description: Cross-language conformance for the hive cached-availability check. A stream's behaviorHints.vortx.cachedServices (debrid wire-strings, byte-frozen to the DebridService enum) is matched case-insensitively against the user's enabled debrid services; a match means the engine treats the stream as instant-cached (facts, not tokens: the user's own debrid re-confirms on play) so the ranker floats it to the top of its tier. Empty on either side, or a plain stream with no vortx object, is never cached. user_services are DebridService wire-strings.
